basic.name: Basic Pack
basic.description: The cheapest pack and the free hourly drop. Mostly common cards, with some uncommon cards.

adventurer.name: Adventurer Pack
adventurer.description: A solid booster with much better odds for uncommon, rare, and mid-tier cards.

royal.name: Royal Pack
royal.description: An expensive pack with a strong high-tier boost and a real chance for a big pull.

celestial.name: Celestial Pack
celestial.description: The most expensive booster. Focused most heavily on the highest tiers.

help.title: User Guide
help.description: The most important bot commands and a quick start for players and administrators.

quick_start.setup: 1. An administrator runs `/setup` to configure the bot channel and pack cadence.
quick_start.open: 2. A player opens packs with `/open` to get cards of server members.
quick_start.inventory: 3. Check your collection with `/inventory`, and preview a specific card with `/cards id:<id>`.
quick_start.market: 4. Extra cards can be sold directly with `/sell` or listed on the market with `/market list`.

commands.open: `/open [pack] [amount]` - opens a selected pack; small pulls use a slider, large pulls show a summary.
commands.odds: `/odds [pack]` - shows the drop odds for a selected pack.
commands.cards: `/cards id:<id>` - generates a preview of a selected card.
commands.balance: `/balance` - shows your coins, packs, and time until the next pack.
commands.shop: `/shop view` and `/shop buy` - better packs for coins.
commands.sell: `/sell id:<id>` - sells a card for its base value.
commands.trade: `/trade user:<player> your_card:<id> their_card:<id>` - proposes a card trade.
commands.top: `/top [by]` - leaderboard by coins, card count, or highest tier.
commands.dev: `/dev ...` - testing tools available only in development mode.

dev.preview_only_owner: Only the person who started this preview can browse card styles.

errors.generic: An error occurred while executing this command.
errors.no_permission: You need the **Administrator** permission to use this command.
errors.database_unavailable: The bot could not connect to the database. Check whether PostgreSQL is running and whether `DATABASE_URL` is correct.
